title: A AADANA ADAM
description: This is the first draft of the first  lesson in a Somali to English transition primer.  Questions and suggestions for improvement are welcome!

pages.text: Bloom Library catalog card for "A AADANA ADAM" (Somali). This is the first draft of the first  lesson in a Somali to English transition primer.  Questions and suggestions for improvement are welcome!
This reader entry is a source card, not a mirrored book — its license (CC BY-NC-SA) allows reading at the source but not redistribution here. Use Open original to read it free at Bloom Library.
